question_text: Which word means a small furry animal that says 'meow'?
Look at the sky on a clear sunny day. What color is the sky?
Every morning, I ___ my teeth before going to school.
explanation: 이를 닦다는 표현은 'brush one\'s teeth'입니다. 주어가 I이므로 동사 원형 'brush'를 씁니다.

question_text: Choose the sentence that correctly uses the present perfect tense.

choices.label: A
choices.text: She has went to Paris last year.

choices.label: B
choices.text: She have gone to Paris many times.

choices.label: C
choices.text: She has gone to Paris many times.

choices.label: D
choices.text: She had went to Paris before.

explanation: 현재완료 시제는 'have/has + 과거분사'로 구성됩니다. 3인칭 단수 'She'에는 'has'를 사용하고, 'go'의 과거분사는 'gone'입니다.

question_text: According to the passage, what is the leading source of ocean plastic pollution?

choices.label: A
choices.text: Oil spills from large cargo ships

choices.label: B
choices.text: Plastic debris carried by rivers from inland areas

choices.label: C
choices.text: Industrial waste discharged directly into the sea

choices.label: D
choices.text: Fishing nets abandoned by commercial fishing fleets

explanation: 지문에 따르면 해양 플라스틱 오염의 주요 원인은 내륙에서 강을 통해 유입되는 플라스틱 쓰레기입니다.
passage: Ocean plastic pollution has emerged as a critical environmental threat. Studies suggest that rivers act as major conduits, transporting plastic waste from inland communities directly into the sea. This river-borne debris accounts for a substantial portion of all marine plastic. Microplastics from this waste enter the food chain, affecting marine organisms and ultimately posing risks to human health.
